server.name: sage-kernel
server.description: MCP control surface for Sage Kernel OS.

prompts.name: sage.audit-repo
prompts.title: Audit Repository
prompts.description: Audit a repository for production readiness, security, tests, docs, and release risk.

prompts.name: sage.run-full-qa
prompts.title: Run Full QA
prompts.description: Run the full local QA and verification gate sequence.

prompts.name: sage.create-project
prompts.title: Create Project
prompts.description: Plan a new production-ready project from a Sage template.

prompts.name: sage.inspect-approvals
prompts.title: Inspect Approvals
prompts.description: Review pending approvals and explain which risky actions are waiting.

prompts.name: sage.prepare-release
prompts.title: Prepare Release
prompts.description: Prepare a release checklist and verify release readiness.

prompts.name: sage.stress-test-server
prompts.title: Stress Test Server
prompts.description: Run local stress tests against queue and dashboard endpoints.

prompts.name: sage.explain-failed-job
prompts.title: Explain Failed Job
prompts.description: Explain a failed job run and propose a repair plan.

prompts.name: sage.plan-my-day
prompts.title: Plan My Day
prompts.description: Create a daily engineering plan from current project state, runbooks, evals, and gates.

prompts.name: sage.project-standup
prompts.title: Project Standup
prompts.description: Summarize current project status as a standup update.

prompts.name: sage.execute-release-runbook
prompts.title: Execute Release Runbook
prompts.description: Walk through the release runbook with explicit verification and approval boundaries.

prompts.name: sage.explain-current-risk
prompts.title: Explain Current Risk
prompts.description: Explain current project risk from evals, coverage, approvals, memory, and release state.
